posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Creating item, then filling columns scrolling and moving the table…I would like have this workflow more efficient.
In case of creating item: After type item name and enter, show which columns the predefined need to be filled. that mean admin or who create the board can activate that requiered option.
In case changing column: After change status, show columns that need to be filled.
